docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $215.00) SERVED FEB-05-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TELLIER, JODI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTEL, GENEVA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TELLIER, JODI $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $67.00 INTEREST, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,332.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000 ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MARTEL, GENEVA AS TO DEFENDANT TELLIER, JODI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTEL, GENEVA AS TO DEFENDANT TELLIER, JODI
